specs.summary: Covers dev_server module, JIT execution, and TypeScript/JSX transformation pipeline via tree-sitter. Directly relevant to #1090 (TypeScript type stripping), #1089 (dev-mode module transforms), and #1091 (dev server serves modules to browser).
Covers StoreManager at ~/.jet-store/{name}@{version}/ with install_package and link_package. Directly relevant to #1092 — store entries currently have no nested node_modules.
Production build pipeline using the same Bundler. Relevant to #1089 — optimizeDeps reuses the bundler's transform infrastructure.
Store GC, hoisting, pnpm-style features. Context for #1092: pnpm's store design.
Workspace symlink creation. Background context for #1092 nested store symlinks.
Dev mode watch integration. Background for dev_server/mod.rs HMR hooks.

codebase_explored.summary: Axum HTTP server with HMR, pre_bundle_cjs_deps() line-based flattening. Target for #1089 and #1091.
AST TypeScript stripping via tree-sitter. Missing: export type, import type, declare, satisfies. Target for #1090.
StoreManager: install_package, link_package. No nested node_modules. Target for #1092.
JIT engine uses same Transformer. Context for consistent TS transform behavior.

revision_notes: Review accepted with no issues. Content unchanged — reaffirming same spec plan.
